sections.paragraph:
ποῖ interrog. adv. (Theognis et al.; Celsus 6, 11; Jos., Ant. 1, 197; 16, 373) where? whither? 1 Cl 28:4.—DELG s.v. πο-.

interrog. interrog. = interrogative

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Theognis Theognis , VI b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Celsus Celsus , in Origen, Contra Celsum, II a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 839
